mano_cua.result_summary: 应用持续卡在loading页面无法进入管理后台。dev环境配置的后端API地址为http://api-dashboard.yudao.iocoder.cn/admin-api，页面加载后一直显示loading spinner无法跳转到登录页或商品属性页面。mano-cua等待5分钟+多次刷新均无法通过loading。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: The application has been loading for many minutes showing the loading spinner. Cannot access login page or product attribute page. The app requires backend API service which appears unreachable.
